definitions.text: What person or people; which person or people; asks for the identity of someone; used in a direct or indirect question.
examples: You're getting married‽ Who to? (direct question)
I don't know who it is. (indirect question)

definitions.text: Introduces a relative clause having a human antecedent. With antecedent as subject.
examples: That's the man who works at the newsagent. (defining)
My sister, who works in the accounts department, just got promoted to manager. (non-defining)
That's the man who works at the newsagent. (defining)
My sister, who works in the accounts department, just got promoted to manager. (non-defining)

definitions.text: A person under discussion; a question of which person.
